description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches node_modules/ and yarn.lock, defines stages install, test, pre-build, build, docker, staging, report, and sets CI_DEV_IMAGE_NAME, CI_PROD_IMAGE_NAME, DOCKER_DRIVER variables. In the install stage add an install job using node:8 that runs "yarn --force", "mkdir coverage", "mkdir .nyc_output" and stores node_modules, coverage and .nyc_output as hour‑old artifacts. In the test stage add a test job using node:8 that depends on install, runs "yarn test" and uploads coverage and .nyc_output as one‑day artifacts. In the pre-build stage add dev:pre-build (only develop) and prod:pre-build (only master) jobs that perform sed replacements with $SQL_* and $EMAIL_* variables to generate src/config.js, produce a one‑hour artifact of src/config.js and set the environment to socrates-dev or socrates-prod respectively. In the build stage add dev:build and prod:build jobs (only develop or master) using node:8 that run "yarn" then "yarn build" and publish the dist directory as a one‑day artifact. In the docker stage add dev:docker and prod:docker jobs that depend on their build jobs, use the docker:dind service, move built files into a docker folder, log in to the registry with $CI_JOB_TOKEN, build an image with "--build-arg APP_PORT=4444" using $CI_DEV_IMAGE_NAME or $CI_PROD_IMAGE_NAME and push it. In the staging stage add dev:staging and prod:staging jobs that run only on develop or master, use the wzrdtales/ci-rancher-tools:latest image, export Rancher and DB variables, and execute "rancher-compose" to upgrade the socrates-dev or socrates-prod stack. Finally, add a pages job that runs only on develop, depends on test, moves coverage into a public folder, renames the page, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that persists 30 days.
